mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasting_note ( user_id, drink_id, title, content, rating, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{drinkId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{rating}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tasting_note WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM tasting_note WHERE drink_id = #{drinkId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tasting_note WHERE drink_id = #{drinkId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY rating DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tasting_note SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE tasting_note SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tasting_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
